prestazioni: 4G63T (7-bolt, 85.4mm bore, 88mm stroke) forged internals upgrade with Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 1.2mm overbore capacity, supporting 1.5-bar boost on a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger with a 0.64 A/R turbine housing and 56 trim compressor wheel

GReddy Profec B Spec II standalone ECU with custom 260cc/min Denso 195500-2070 injectors, HKS 264°/264° camshafts (intake/exhaust), and a Tomei Type-S adjustable cam gear set for optimized overlap on 98 RON fuel

Custom 3-inch turbo-back exhaust system by Fujitsubo Giken with a 304 stainless steel 76mm diameter downpipe, 200-cell catalytic converter delete, and a 3.5-inch titanium-wrapped center section leading to a Burns Stainless 3.5-inch muffler with 4-inch dual exits, paired with a HKS Super Power Flow Type-R front pipe
estetica: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Evo II-specific front fenders, rear quarter panels, and overfenders) with custom carbon fiber canards and a 3D-printed ABS front splitter reinforced with aluminum honeycomb core for 30kg downforce at 160km/h

Voltex Type-3 rear wing with a 1,500mm carbon fiber blade, 3D-printed aluminum endplates, and a custom Gurney flap adjustable from 0-15mm for track-specific aero balance, mounted on OEM-spec reinforced rear pillars

Custom Enkei PF07 17x9 +22 wheels with 245/40R17 Yokohama Advan A052 tires, powder-coated in BBS Gold, paired with Project Mu 8-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers clamping 356mm and 330mm two-piece rotors with directional vane cooling
